role_justifications.conductor: Coordinates the CSS assessment and enforces no-CSS-change gates.
role_justifications.planner: Defines CSS region mapping, oracle surfaces, and resistance strategy.
role_justifications.worker: Builds the test-only computed-style oracle and writes CSS tangle artifacts.
role_justifications.change_verifier: Verifies no CSS rule changes ship and mutation probes are restored.
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: Checks the oracle includes accessibility-relevant visual states and controls.
role_justifications.critic: Checks determinism, mutation resistance, and zero CSS rule changes.
role_justifications.acceptance_gate: Validates delegation proof, artifacts, e2e, verdict, and committed scope.

orchestration: Use the frontend-ui-task scaffold for audit artifacts and delegate the frontend-required roles plus the core MAW roles. No CSS rule edits are allowed to ship.
quality_bar: Computed-style captures must be deterministic 10/10 and must catch temporary color and spacing CSS mutations before any future CSS consolidation relies on the oracle.
deterministic_checks: temporary CSS color and spacing mutation probes must be caught by the oracle, then reverted
git diff -- app/static/themes.css app/static/dashboard-grid.css app/static/tokens.css must be empty
acceptance_criteria: artifacts/css-core-map.md covers themes.css and dashboard-grid.css contiguously and 100%.
artifacts/css-oracle-resistance.json proves one color and one spacing mutation were caught.
artifacts/css-consolidation-plan.md ranks future consolidation candidates without changing CSS.
No CSS file has a committed content diff.
Final chat verdict matches artifacts/acceptance-result.json verbatim.
